title: (Bullish Signal) RAMP, RSI Indicator left the oversold zone on February 24, 2021
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This is a signal that RAMP's price could be shifting from a downtrend to an uptrend. Traders may consider buying the stock or exploring call options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor looked back and found 30 similar cases where RAMP's RSI Indicator left the oversold zone, and in 24 of them led to a successful outcome. Odds of Success: 80%. Current price $63.50 crossed the support line at $70.01 and is trading between $70.01 support and $61.08 support lines. Throughout the month of 01/22/21 - 02/24/21, the price experienced a -20% Downtrend. During the week of 02/17/21 - 02/24/21, the stock fell -4%. 

https://preview.redd.it/xpu68mmqnoj61.png?width=1529&format=png&auto=webp&s=16142103345576ae3341b2e300ef16df86f10519

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The RSI Oscillator points to a transition from a downward trend to an upward trend -- in cases where RAMP's RSI Oscillator exited the oversold zone, 24 of 30 resulted in an increase in price. Tickeron's analysis proposes that the odds of a continued upward trend are 80%.

The Stochastic Indicator shows that the ticker has stayed in the oversold zone for 9 days. The price of this ticker is presumed to bounce back soon, since the longer the ticker stays in the oversold zone, the more promptly an upward trend is expected.

Following a +4.02% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where RAMP advanced for three days, in 225 of 311 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 72%.

RAMP may jump back above the lower band and head toward the middle band. Traders may consider buying the stock or exploring call options.

[Full information about signal here](https://tickeron.com/news/9511989-liveramp-holdings-ramp-66-88-rsi-indicator-left-the-oversold-zone-on-february-24-2021?utm_source=reddit&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=test&utm_content=blog)
